  "watchlist_notes": "Strong setups not entered today: ONGC (52w high, oil tailwind), SUNPHARMA — already held; ATGL/NLCINDIA — power cluster already concentrated (NTPC+POWERGRID+COALINDIA already ~40% of deployed). VBL volume surge interesting for next session. RELIANCE awaiting better entry. Cluster discipline: I already have 3 power/energy names (NTPC+POWERGRID+COALINDIA) plus pending TATAPOWER and HINDZINC orders — adding ONGC or NLCINDIA would create excessive cluster risk. Skipping new entries.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Book at 45% deployed, multiple positions at or near breakeven SL. 5-day stats poor (14% win rate, profit factor 0.4x) — exactly the time to NOT add risk. Three pending CNC LIMIT orders (PHARMABEES, HINDZINC, TATAPOWER) still working from earlier — letting those fill or expire rather than stacking. Late session (14:41, 48 min to close) means no new MIS entries permissible after 14:30 anyway. Capital preservation mode. Energy/Power cluster exposure is at the limit (NTPC 5%, POWERGRID 5%, COALINDIA 4.7%, plus pending TATAPOWER 4.9%) — total ~20% if TATAPOWER fills, which is the cluster ceiling per discipline rules. No more adds to that theme."
}
